files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+Manifest-Version: 1.0
+Bundle-ManifestVersion: 2
+Bundle-Name: JMC AI Plug-in Tests
+Bundle-SymbolicName: org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.test;singleton:=true
+Bundle-Version: 10.0.0.qualifier
+Bundle-Vendor: Oracle Corporation
+Fragment-Host: org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai
+Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment: JavaSE-21
+Bundle-ActivationPolicy: lazy
+Require-Bundle: org.junit
+Automatic-Module-Name: org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.test

@@ -3,1 +3,2 @@
-   Copyright (c) 2018, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+   Copyright (c) 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+   Copyright (c) 2026, Datadog, Inc. All rights reserved.
@@ -41,1 +42,1 @@
-	<artifactId>org.openjdk.jmc.flightrecorder.ext.jfx.test</artifactId>
+	<artifactId>org.openjdk.jmc.ui.ai.test</artifactId>
